from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_bda2d7a6(I):
    x1 = partition(I)
    x2 = order(x1, size)
    x3 = apply(color, x2)
    x4 = last(x2)
    x5 = remove(x4, x2)
    x6 = repeat(x4, ONE)
    x7 = combine(x6, x5)
    x8 = mpapply(recolor, x3, x7)
    O = paint(I, x8)
    return O
